title: Elytra & Capes
description: Choose any vanilla cape to use client-side.
body:
# Your Cape, Your Choice!

Equip any available cape instantly through a simple in-game menu.

## Features

* **Any Vanilla Cape:**
  Browse and select from all vanilla capes included in the mod.

* **Matching Elytra:**
  Your Elytra automatically matches the cape you have selected.

* **Client-Side Only:**
  No server installation required and no changes are made to your account settings.

## How to Use

1. Open the cape menu by pressing **O** or through **Mod Menu**.
2. Select a cape.
3. Done!

* (Optional) Enable matching Elytra icon.

Your cape updates instantly. If Elytra icon are enabled, the game will automatically reload its textures.

![In Game Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Cmbmrahm/images/c998230a609a73362bb4b83edd29906ecbba357b.png)

![All Elytra Icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Cmbmrahm/images/5b24b3de5b82881049a690155d56eaf27a3e08e2.png)

## Future Updates

* Additional capes may be added in future updates.
* More Elytra icons may be added over time.

This project is not affiliated with Mojang Studios.
